Container.Name: Delegatarr-alpha
Container.Overview: Delegatarr Alpha (Go Edition) is an automated background service for Deluge that manages storage by automatically removing torrents based on customizable rules. It evaluates tracker domains, labels, seeding time, and ratios to keep your client clean. Note: This version connects via the Deluge WebUI API.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port used to access the Delegatarr web dashboard.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Path where Delegatarr saves your rules and settings.

Config.Name: Deluge IP
Config.Description: The local IP address of your Deluge container.

Config.Name: Deluge WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port used to access your Deluge Web interface (usually 8112).
